	<script>
	 var CDN_SYS = 'https://a1cf74336522e87f135f-2f21ace9a6cf0052456644b80fa06d4f.ssl.cf2.rackcdn.com/';
	 var CDN_USR = 'https://30c57e491d34574ac3c4-d69fd22d5bffeab44970d3ac75e05830.ssl.cf2.rackcdn.com/';
	</script>

	<script src="/hub/dist/libs.js?v=20250218193026"></script>
	<script src='/hub/dist/scripts.js?v=20250218193026'></script>
	<script>
	 var A = false;

	 $(function() {

	  //decorateFans();
	  //initFannable();

	  new Vue({
	   el: '#comments'
	  });

	  
	  if (!$('.ignore-modal').length) {

	      path: '/'
	     });
	     startModal();
	    }
	   }, 15000);

	  $('.killable').click(function() {

	   return false;

	  window.cookieconsent.initialise({

	 });
	</script>

	
  <script>
    var auth = false;
    var loaded = 0;

    $(function() {
      runner();

      $('.popup-ajax').magnificPopup({
        type: 'ajax'
      });

      $('.js___dashboard-welcome-cta__close-button').click(function() {
        $('#dashboard-welcome-pane').hide();
        $.post("/hub/api/settings", {
          "cta-feed-intro": 1
        }, function(data) {
          console.log('welcome removed.');
        });
      });
    });

    function runner() {
      console.log('runner auth:' + auth + ' loaded:' + loaded);

      if (auth) {
        switch (loaded) {
          case 0:
            dashboardLoad('your-character-recs', '/hub/recs/characters?dataonly=1');
            dashboardLoad('characters-most-like-you', '/hub/api/user-to-characters-pane/?dataonly=1', [
              'data', 'characters'
            ]);
            dashboardLoad('picked-for-your-personality', '/hub/recs/titles?dataonly=1&filter=movie');
            break;
          case 2:
            dashboardLoad('quizzes-to-take', '/hub/match?dataonly=1');
            dashboardLoad('recently-added-characters',
              '/hub/api/user-to-recent-characters-pane/?dataonly=1', ['data', 'characters']);
            dashboardLoad('your-darkside-matches',
              '/hub/api/user-to-darkside-characters-pane/?dataonly=1', ['data', 'characters']);
            break;
          case 5:
            dashboardLoad('trending-on-user-lists', '/hub/recs/trending-titles?dataonly=1&opinion=2');
            // dashboardLoad('because-you-like', '/hub/characters/because-you-recs', ['matches']);
            dashboardLoad('most-popular-characters', '/hub/recs/popular-characters?dataonly=1');
            break;
        }
      } else {
        switch (loaded) {
          case 0:
            dashboardLoad('most-popular-characters', '/hub/recs/popular-characters?dataonly=1');
            dashboardLoad('recently-added-characters', '/hub/api/user-to-recent-characters-pane/1?dataonly=1', ['data',
              'characters'
            ]);
            dashboardLoad('trending-on-user-lists', '/hub/recs/trending-titles?dataonly=1&opinion=2');
            break;
          case 2:
            dashboardLoad('quizzes-to-take', '/hub/match?dataonly=1');
            // dashboardLoad('because-you-like', '/hub/characters/because-you-recs', ['matches']);
            break;
        }
      }
    }

    function dashboardLoad(targetID, requestURL, nestedDataKeys) {
      $.getJSON(requestURL, function(data) {

        if (data == '0') {
          $('#' + targetID).hide();
          return;
        }

        // Appended data
        const titleData = data.title_data;
        if (titleData) {
          $('#' + targetID + ' [data-target-title-data]').text(titleData);
        }

        const seeAllUrl = data.see_all_url;
        if (seeAllUrl) {
          $('#' + targetID + ' [data-target-see-all-url]').attr('href', seeAllUrl);
        }

        // Redefine data if expected result is nested
        if (nestedDataKeys && nestedDataKeys.length) {
          while (nestedDataKeys.length) {
            data = data[nestedDataKeys[0]];
            nestedDataKeys.shift();
          }
        }

        const elements = $('#' + targetID + ' [data-element]');

        let rounds = $('#' + targetID).data('multi-row-rounds');
        if (!rounds) {
          rounds = 1;
        }

        let currentIndex = 0;
        while(rounds > 0){
          currentIndex = loopOverData(data, elements, currentIndex);
          rounds--;
        }

        loaded++;

        runner();
      });
    }

    function loopOverData(data, elements, currentIndex){
      $.each(data, function(index, value) {
        const dataReferences = $(elements[currentIndex]).find('[data-reference]');
        for (var i = 0; i < dataReferences.length; i++) {

          const reference = $(dataReferences[i]).data('reference');
          const prefixPath = $(dataReferences[i]).data('prefix-path');

          switch (reference) {
            case "displayname":
              $(dataReferences[i]).text(value.displayname);
              break;
            case "fullname":
              $(dataReferences[i]).text(value.fullname);
              break;
            case "image":
              $(dataReferences[i]).attr("src", value.image);
              break;
            case "image_name":
              $(dataReferences[i]).attr("src", CDN_SYS + "images/characters/square/400/" + value.short_url +
                ".webp");
                            break;
            case "quiz_image":
              $(dataReferences[i]).attr("src", value.quiz_image);
              break;
            case "title":
              $(dataReferences[i]).text(value.title);
              break;
            case "url":
              $(dataReferences[i]).attr("href", value.url);
              break;
          }
        }
        currentIndex++;
      });      

      return currentIndex;
    }

  </script>


		<!-- Google tag (gtag.js) -->
	<script async src="https://www.googletagmanager.com/gtag/js?id=G-CTRHWP6G4B"></script>
